## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have kept instructions concise and token-efficient
- [ ] I have used imperative voice for instructions
- [ ] I have removed any redundant information

### Testing
- [ ] I have tested my changes thoroughly
- [ ] I have tested with real job descriptions
- [ ] My changes produce expected results
- [ ] No existing functionality is broken

### Documentation
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] I have updated SKILL.md with any changes
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] I have updated README.md (if needed)
- [ ] I have updated other relevant documentation

### Examples
- [ ] I have added examples demonstrating new features (if applicable)
- [ ] Examples are anonymized and don't contain personal information
- [ ] Examples include before/after comparisons (if applicable)

### Validation
- [ ] YAML frontmatter is valid
- [ ] Skill can be packaged successfully
- [ ] No validation errors
- [ ] File structure is correct

## For Maintainers

### Pre-Merge Checklist
- [ ] Code review completed
- [ ] Changes tested in Claude
- [ ] Documentation is adequate
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Version bumped (if needed)
- [ ] No conflicts with main branch

### Post-Merge Actions
- [ ] Update release notes
- [ ] Create new .skill package
- [ ] Update GitHub release
- [ ] Announce changes (if significant)
